status.note: Confirmed in chat thread; polish must not drop these constraints. Do not run generative skill_polish.py overwrite on this mature skill—manual polish only.

skill.name: granoflow-project-definition
skill.summary: Initialize or refine a Granoflow software project through three steps—Project Work, Design Baseline with tokens, and App Shell—lock stack-capable visuals under contract fidelity, and hand off to milestone/task skills. Activate with "Initialize this project" / "Define this project" / "初始化这个项目"; not "Initialize Granoflow".
skill.purpose: Guide Project Work, Design Spec/Shell Baseline, widgets catalog, and handoff while enforcing Mode Gate, Preview Gate, and fail-closed design contracts.
triggers: Initialize this project / Define this project / 初始化这个项目 / 定义这个项目
Lock Design Baseline, tokens, and App Shell for a Granoflow software project
user_examples: 根据这些产品文档初始化项目并锁定设计基线

constraints.text: executionMode defaults to interactive; never infer unattended from activation phrases alone.
Interactive: ask → recommend → wait. Never auto-accept Baseline+Shell in interactive mode.
Interactive Design Spec triad uses three different random seeds (spec_match + two challengers).
From Shell onward design style converges; Shell options must perfectly fit the selected Spec (no independent palette seed). shell_spec_mismatch on violation.
After Baseline confirm, write widgets.yaml (first mandatory extract); task prototypes reuse widgets and forbid random seeds.

Task interactive prototypes: default dual page expressions (expr_a + expr_b) inside locked Design System; mix-and-match per task/page; ≥2 contrast axes; conditional industry_peer_c third; Craft Gate before visualConfirmed. Never reopen Design Spec as task options. Unattended: single expr_a only.
Prototype Preview Gate stays explicit for every HTML prototype option batch.
product_spec_coverage.status ready before Done; Missing Shell fails Done.

workflow.title: Project Work
workflow.goal: Confirm Project Work with stack, libraries, data persistence, coverage, and skill_routing.
rules: ask → recommend → wait unless explicit unattended

workflow.title: Design Spec + Tokens
workflow.goal: Author Design Spec under Mode split, then tokens.
rules: interactive triad distinct seeds; unattended single random-seed spec_match

workflow.title: App Shell + Baseline + widgets
workflow.goal: Fit Shell to Spec, lock Baseline package, extract widgets.yaml.
checkpoints: Never auto-accept Baseline+Shell in interactive mode

references.when: interviewing or recommending Project Work values
authoring Design Spec, Shell, widgets, or task prototypes
verifying thread-confirmed fail-closed rules before Done or visualConfirmed
